response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack and D/TypeScript engineer with broad product experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure or distributed systems with a cloud-compute focus. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no evidence of cloud compute platform architecture, C++ at scale, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Core minimum qualifications are not met.
strengths: Long, varied senior engineering career across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong testing/TDD culture, mentoring, workshops, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency services at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
concerns: Far short of 8 years C++; primary languages are TypeScript/Node and D
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed-systems architecture leadership
No explicit technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and mentoring history
